overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk, starting at a toll booth checkpoint, passing under an elevated highway with graffiti-covered pillars, and continuing along a waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and neon billboards. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring the game's distinctive neon-lit aesthetic and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: toll booth checkpoint at urban intersection

events.description: futuristic vehicle drives through the intersection from left to right
begins walking across the wide yellow-striped pedestrian crossing

agents.ego_description: walking across a wide intersection with bold yellow safety stripes near a futuristic toll booth checkpoint

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: futuristic checkpoint structure with red no_entry signs and illuminated green directional signage
massive cylindrical concrete tower with multiple spotlights near the toll plaza
tall orange pole with traffic signals and a large vertical billboard displaying red characters
wide pedestrian crossing with bold black and yellow diagonal safety stripes

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic toll booth checkpoint during dusk, with neon lights illuminating the area. The camera walks across a wide intersection marked with yellow diagonal stripes while a futuristic car passes through. A massive traffic control tower rises on the left, and an orange traffic pole with signage stands prominently on the right.

events.description: moves from open intersection into the covered area beneath the elevated highway structure
graffiti tags become visible on the concrete support pillars

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive elevated highway structure past concrete pillars covered in graffiti

entered.detail: underside of the massive elevated highway with green structural beams and concrete decking
massive yellow concrete pillars supporting the highway overhead, covered in green graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath a massive elevated highway structure, transitioning from the open intersection to a semi-covered walkway. The environment becomes darker with artificial lighting, and massive concrete pillars covered in green graffiti line the path. The yellow crosswalk markings fall behind as the camera continues forward under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with futuristic skyscrapers and palm trees

events.description: exits the covered highway area into open street with towering skyscrapers ahead
palm trees and a large neon billboard arch become prominent in the view

agents.ego_description: walking along a city street lined with palm trees toward a massive glass skyscraper and neon signage

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk in the distance

entered.detail: tall dark glass building with illuminated windows towering over the street ahead
tall palm trees lining the right side of the sidewalk
large illuminated archway sign with neon lights spanning across the street
metal barrier separating the pedestrian walkway from the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the highway, the scene opens into a wide city street with a massive glass skyscraper dominating the view ahead. Palm trees line the right side of the walkway, and a large neon billboard arch spans the street in the distance. The camera continues walking forward as the urban landscape transitions toward a waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade overlooking the city skyline

events.description: view opens up to reveal the waterfront and distant illuminated city skyline across the water
slight turn to the right to view the water and distant cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade looking at the illuminated city skyline and bridge across the water

entered.detail: body of water reflecting the orange and blue city lights
cluster of illuminated futuristic skyscrapers across the water with glowing windows
arched bridge structure with lights spanning across the water in the distance
tall cylindrical tower with spotlights visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the waterfront promenade where the view opens to reveal a body of water with an illuminated city skyline across it. Palm trees now line the left side as the camera moves forward, while the right side features a railing overlooking the water. A lit bridge arches in the distance, and the neon glow of the distant city reflects off the water's surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit traffic checkpoint through a gritty urban underpass and out toward a glowing waterfront promenade. It begins at a futuristic toll booth during dusk, moving across a wide intersection marked with yellow stripes as a car passes beneath a massive traffic control tower. As the camera advances, the open intersection gives way to the shadows of a massive elevated highway, where the environment darkens and the path is lined with concrete pillars covered in green graffiti. The scene then opens back into the light of a wide city street dominated by a glass skyscraper and palm trees, moving toward a large neon billboard arch. Finally, the camera reaches the waterfront promenade, where the view expands to reveal a lit bridge and a shimmering city skyline reflecting off the water's surface.
